title: Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Paint Roller Set 9in | Kit Includes: 1 x 9" Tray, Frame & Roller Sleeve
features: The Essentials 9 inch roller set is ideal for painting large interior surfaces such as walls or ceilings with emulsion paints
The 9 inch roller frame can be attached to a push fit Harris extension pole so large areas can be covered faster
For best results lightly rinse the roller sleeve in water before use to remove any loose fibres
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Essentials 9" Walls & Ceilings Roller Set What's Included Contents 1 x 9" Tray 1 x 9" Roller Sleeves 1 x 9" Roller Frame Starting a project? The Harris 9" roller set teams up with other brushes, rollers and accessories in the Harris Essentials range. Essentials 9" Walls & Ceilings Roller Set This 9" Roller set from Harris is for use when painting large areas on walls & ceilings and woodwork. The roller is ideal for use on smooth & semi smooth surfaces and gives a good finish with emulsion paint. Extend Your Reach Looking to extend your reach? Simply attach the roller frame to a Harris Extension Pole with a push fit attachment. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎9in Roller Frame, 9in Roller Sleeve, 9in Roller Tray
